nodes.label: AI as verification tool for simple calculations
nodes.label_negative: Manual calculation with risk of error

nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.grounding_span: AI does not have up to date satellite imagery, or context of what the survey requirements are

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI false confidence in error detection
nodes.grounding_span: the model could not figure it out, but it still pretended to find errors

nodes.label: AI as practical labor-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: Extended manual work after physical labor
nodes.grounding_span: After a long day in the sun doing a level loop, i did not want to do calculations

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work
nodes.grounding_span: AI to do the math in a few seconds, whereas I would take 10+ minutes

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: i feel secure in my position

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for routine numerical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I got home earlier, and saved any potential calculation errors so I was satisfied

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: the model could not figure it out, but it still pretended to find errors, which was very frustrating

nodes.label: Confidence in human judgment over AI
nodes.grounding_span: the human eye on the worksite is still much better

nodes.label: Delegation with verification — offloads complex tasks but double-checks results
nodes.grounding_span: i would quickly understand if something went wrong when seeing the results

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI still lacks context and up to date data of worksites that surveyors need
